paragraph: Write easy-to-read notes with these Dixon Ticonderoga wood-case #2 soft, yellow-barrel pencils. These pencils are sold in a pack of 24, which is ideal for busy offices and classrooms, and the solid graphite core delivers a smooth performance and easy-to-read text. These Dixon Ticonderoga wood-case pencils have a latex-free eraser to make it easy to correct mistakes on paper.
bullets: High-quality wooden pencils
This pencil has No. 2 lead that resists breakage for smooth writing
This smooth-writing quality pencil features the classic yellow hexagonal shape
Features a soft lead for smooth, polished writing
Pencils come in pack of 24 and can replace pens during many common work-related tasks or projects
Top-quality, latex-free eraser provides easy, clean corrections
headliner: Sketch and jot down notes with accuracy with this 24-pack of Dixon Ticonderoga wood-case #2 soft yellow-barrel pencils.

paragraph: Post-it Notes stick securely and remove cleanly, featuring a unique adhesive designed for use on paper. The 3 in. x 3 in. size is great to call out important information or leave notes in calendars or planners. America’s #1 favorite sticky note. Canary Yellow color helps your note break through the clutter. Jot down an inspirational message each day to keep positivity going strong throughout your work day. Post-it Notes are recyclable and the paper in Post-it Notes is sourced from certified, renewable and responsibly managed forests. 4 Pads per pack, 50 sheets per pad.
bullets: 3 in. x 3 in., Canary Yellow
Post-it Notes stick securely and remove cleanly
Unique adhesive designed for use on paper or in planners
America’s #1 favorite sticky note
Leave reminders or call out important information
4 Pads per pack, 50 sheets per pad
Post-it Notes are recyclable
The paper in Post-it Notes is sourced from certified, renewable and responsibly managed forests

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: No highlighter shines as bright. Perfect for when info is high priority and precision is a must, the Sharpie pocket highlighter makes everything highly visible. This versatile highlighter is designed to fit effortlessly in your pocket or clip to your shirt, so it's easy to take with you anywhere. With brilliant, transparent quick-drying ink and an easy gliding chisel tip that highlights and underlines both wide and narrow lines of text, this Sharpie highlighter makes your most important thoughts and notes jump off the page. It's no wonder why Sharpie is a must-have highlighter for travel itineraries, camping checklists, escape plans, and the rest of life's major high points.
bullets: Easy to control, light on your hands, and easy to store, this super slim stick highlighter is perfect for all-day study sessions
Chisel tip highlights and underlines both wide and narrow lines of text
Vivid, high-contrast yellow ink adds colorful emphasis
User-friendly, quick-drying, and odorless AP certified formula
Pocket clip-on cap keeps the highlighter within easy reach
Four highlighters per pack
Smear Guard ink technology resists smearing of many pen and marker inks (let the ink dry before highlighting)
Meets or exceeds the ACMI and AP standards
